name: Defense Shield
description: 6-layer prompt injection defense — L1 sanitizer on inbound messages, L3 gate + L4 redaction on outbound responses

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the defense shield

autoBlockThreshold.label: Auto-Block Threshold
autoBlockThreshold.help: Number of L1 detections + highSeverity that triggers auto-block (default: 5)

workDomains.label: Work Email Domains
workDomains.help: Email domains to preserve in outbound redaction (e.g., company.com)

logVerdicts.label: Log Verdicts
logVerdicts.help: Log every inbound/outbound scan verdict to the plugin logger
